## North Star (managed — do not edit by hand)

This repo is part of one product built on a shared substrate. Architecture is
governed by the **North Star**, kept at: {{NORTH_STAR_REF}}

**Before non-trivial work:**

1. Read `NORTH_STAR.md` (the canonical high-level reference) and any relevant ADR in
   `architecture/decisions/`.
2. Stay inside the boundaries and invariants:
   - **Substrate vs brand:** shared/cross-cutting logic lives in `mainspring`; brand
     code stays in its brand. (ADR-0002)
   - **Metering:** every Anthropic call goes through the metered client and writes a
     `UsageEvent`. No raw SDK path. (ADR-0003)
   - **Decision writes:** Workable decision writes are serialized per org. (ADR-0004)
   - **Migrations:** each brand owns its Alembic chain; never cross-import. (ADR-0005)
3. **If the right change conflicts with the North Star, do not silently diverge.**
   Propose an ADR amending it. The North Star changes by decision, not by drift.
4. **Self-maintaining rule:** any architectural change updates the model
   (`architecture/model/model.yaml`) or adds an ADR in the *same* PR — usually both.

North Star digest: `{{DIGEST}}` (regenerated by `agent/sync_north_star.py`).
